content.speaker: Mr. REID
content.text:
Mr. REID. Mr. President, I ask unanimous consent that the morning 
hour be extended until I am able to speak for 10 minutes as in morning 
business.

content.speaker: The PRESIDING OFFICER
content.text: The PRESIDING OFFICER. Without objection, it is so ordered.

content.speaker: Mr. REID
content.text:
Mr. REID. I thank the Chair.
  (The remarks of Mr. Reid pertaining to the introduction of S.J. Res. 
12 are located in today's Record under ``Statements on Introduced Bills 
and Joint Resolutions.'')
  Mr. REID addressed the Chair.

content.speaker: The PRESIDING OFFICER
content.text:
The PRESIDING OFFICER. The Senator from Nevada.
  (The remarks of Mr. Reid pertaining to the introduction of S. 206 are 
located in today's Record under ``Statements on Introduced Bills and 
Joint Resolutions.'')

content.speaker: Mr. HOLLINGS
content.text: Mr. HOLLINGS. Mr. President, I suggest the absence of a quorum.

content.speaker: The PRESIDING OFFICER
content.text: The PRESIDING OFFICER. The clerk will call the roll.

content.speaker: The RECORDER
content.text: The bill clerk proceeded to call the roll.

content.speaker: Mr. LEAHY
content.text:
Mr. LEAHY. Mr. President, I ask unanimous consent that the order for 
the quorum call be rescinded.

content.speaker: The PRESIDING OFFICER (Mr. Kyl)
content.text:
The PRESIDING OFFICER (Mr. Kyl). Without objection, it is so ordered.
  THE PRESIDING OFFICER (Mr. Bennett). The Senator from Vermont is 
recognized.

content.speaker: Mr. LEAHY
content.text:
Mr. LEAHY. I thank the Chair.
  (The remarks of Mr. Leahy pertaining to the introduction of S. 213 
are located in today's Record under ``Statements on Introduced Bills 
and Joint Resolutions.'')

content.speaker: Mr. LEAHY
content.text:
Mr. LEAHY. Mr. President, I see my good friend from Washington State 
is on the floor. I yield the floor.
  Mr. GORTON addressed the Chair.

content.speaker: The PRESIDING OFFICER
content.text: The PRESIDING OFFICER. The Senator from Washington.
